record.field:
Dear ${object.partner_id.name},

This is a friendly reminder that invoice ${object.name} for ${object.amount_total} ${object.currency_id.name} was due on ${object.invoice_date_due} and remains unpaid.

Please arrange payment at your earliest convenience.

If you have already made payment, please disregard this message.

Thank you for your business.

Dear ${object.partner_id.name},

This is a second notice regarding invoice ${object.name} for ${object.amount_total} ${object.currency_id.name} which was due on ${object.invoice_date_due}.

Your account is now 15 days overdue. Please arrange payment immediately to avoid further action.

If you have already made payment, please contact us with your payment details.

Dear ${object.partner_id.name},

This is a final notice regarding invoice ${object.name} for ${object.amount_total} ${object.currency_id.name} which was due on ${object.invoice_date_due}.

Your account is now 30 days overdue. Immediate payment is required. Failure to pay may result in further action being taken.

Please contact us immediately to resolve this matter.
